raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "AB 1407 accelerates California's marine habitat restoration efforts by establishing recovery goals for critical ocean ecosystems and a state structure to develop and support restoration projects.",
    "AB 2537 establishes the Local and Tribal Communities Offshore Wind Capacity Building Fund to enhance the ability of local communities and tribes to actively participate in the offshore wind development process.",
    "AB 1866 requires oil operators to develop a comprehensive plan to expeditiously plug the estimated 40,000 idle oil wells in California within the next decade.",
    "AB 2298 creates the California Blue Whales and Blue Skies Program, a voluntary vessel speed reduction program to incentivize ocean-going vessels to reduce their speed.",
    "SB 1101 launches a planning process to identify boundaries for managing wildfire and implement prescribed fire projects more quickly.",
    "SB 1135 provides a tax credit for California farmers, ranchers, and landowners who employ farming practices that maximize carbon sequestration on natural and working lands."
  ]
}
```
